title: Why Local AI Matters for India
excerpt: How local language support and regional context can make AI products more useful for daily life.
content:
India’s AI opportunity is not only about model size—it is about relevance. Products that understand local languages, price sensitivity, and real-world workflows solve bigger problems than generic tools.

Start with one city, one use-case, and one local language. Measure retention, not vanity metrics. Then expand with confidence.
author: IndiBargain Team

title: 3 Ways to Cut Inference Cost
excerpt: Simple tactics to reduce AI serving cost without reducing response quality.
content:
Inference bills usually grow faster than expected. Before scaling traffic, lock in basic controls.

1) Use short prompts and strict token limits.
2) Add response caching for repeated queries.
3) Route easy tasks to smaller models first.

These three changes are often enough to reduce spend immediately.
author: IndiBargain Team

title: Build a Better AI Content Workflow
excerpt: A practical publishing flow for drafting, reviewing, and posting articles quickly.
content:
If your team wants to publish consistently, focus on process over tools.

Create a weekly topic list, assign owners, draft with AI assistance, and keep a human editor in the loop. Publish with a fixed cadence so readers know when to expect new posts.
author: IndiBargain Team
